question:
Find the closed form of the recursive function defined by:
\[ f(n) = 2f(n-1) + n-1 \text{ for } n > 1, \]
with the initial condition \( f(n) = 0 \) for \( n < 1 \).
now_step:
Step 1: \[
\begin{aligned}
&\text{To find the closed form, we start by expanding the recursive relation:} \\
&f(n) = 2f(n-1) + (n-1).
\end{aligned}
\]

Verdict: correct

\]
